fragility_points: Fast downside move before noon ET could erase the cushion.
Exchange-specific pricing or operational issues on Binance could matter because Binance is the governing source.
The estimate is sensitive to near-term volatility regime changes.
key_assumptions: Residual risk is mainly exact-minute volatility rather than a broad ETH repricing below 2200.
Binance remains operationally reliable and representative at settlement.
No major macro or crypto-specific shock hits before the resolution minute.
main_logical_chain: Market implies about 95% Yes for ETH above 2200 on April 17.
Direct Binance spot is materially above the strike with less than a day remaining.
That makes Yes the clear base case.
But the contract's narrow exact-minute Binance-close condition leaves more residual risk than a generic spot snapshot suggests.
Therefore the best variant view is a modest confidence discount rather than a directional reversal.
main_thesis: ETH is likely to settle above 2200 on Binance at noon ET April 17, but the market's ~95% confidence looks slightly too high for a one-minute next-day crypto close.
quote_anchors: This market will resolve to 'Yes' if the Binance 1 minute candle for ETH/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone has a final 'Close' price higher than the price specified.
Direct Binance spot check during the run returned ETHUSDT at 2352.52.
source_quality_view: Low ambiguity on settlement mechanics, medium-quality forecasting evidence led by a direct Binance spot check plus contextual cross-checks.
strongest_disconfirmers: The contract resolves on one exact future one-minute close, so current spot is not dispositive.
Crypto can move several percent inside one day, leaving some real failure risk even from a comfortable current cushion.
strongest_supports: Direct Binance ETHUSDT spot check during the run was 2352.52, about 6.9% above the strike.
Secondary contextual price checks also placed ETH in the low 2300s, supporting the primary read.
The contract only requires a strict final close above 2200 on one specified minute.
timing_relevance: This is a date-sensitive, timezone-sensitive market resolving on the Binance ETH/USDT 12:00 ET one-minute candle on 2026-04-17.
unresolved_ambiguities: The future 12:00 ET April 17 final close is not yet observable.
No closer-to-settlement volatility read was available in this run.
what_would_change_view: A closer-to-settlement Binance check still well above 2200 would push the estimate up; a retrace toward 2200, Binance-specific dislocation, or a macro/crypto shock would push it down.
